message:
feat(net/unix): add reactor integration to UnixDatagram

Replace yield_now() busy loops with proper reactor-based wakeup for
all async operations. Uses RefCell for interior mutability since async
methods take &self.

Changes:
- Add registration: RefCell<Option<IoRegistration>> field
- Add register_interest() method for reactor integration
- Convert send, send_to, recv, recv_from to use poll_fn with reactor
- Update poll_recv_ready/poll_send_ready for proper registration
- Convert peek and peek_from to use reactor wakeup
- Add tests for reactor registration behavior

Closes: asupersync-u6ii

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
